backup_camera_04_full:
=== UNREDACTED BACKUP - Mercury General Hospital ===
=== Security Camera 04 - Parking Lot B ===
=== Date: 2024-06-15 ===
=== CLASSIFICATION: CONFIDENTIAL ===

[00:00:00] Parking Lot B - Lot mostly empty. 3 vehicles present.
[01:00:00] No activity.
[02:28:55] Silver Mercedes-Benz E-Class enters Parking Lot B from south entrance.
[02:29:10] Vehicle parks in spot B-14.
[02:29:30] Driver identified: Short Asian male, black leather jacket. Remains in vehicle.
[02:30:45] Driver exits vehicle, enters hospital through ER side entrance.
[02:31:00] Driver accompanies two males carrying an injured third male.
[03:10:15] FOUR males exit through ER side door into Parking Lot B.
[03:10:30] Individuals identified:
           - Male 1: Tall, dark hair (Phil Wenneck)
           - Male 2: Medium build, missing tooth, bleeding (Stu Price)
           - Male 3: Heavy-set, carrying a satchel (Alan Garner)
           - Male 4: Short Asian male, leather jacket (Mr. Chow)
[03:12:00] Group approaches Mercedes trunk.
[03:12:30] Mr. Chow opens trunk with key fob.
[03:13:00] All four males observed LOADING SOMETHING HEAVY into the trunk of the Mercedes.
[03:13:15] Object appears to be a large duffel bag, approximately 5 feet long.
[03:13:30] Alan Garner struggles with his end. Phil Wenneck takes over.
[03:14:00] Trunk closed. Mr. Chow locks vehicle.
[03:14:30] Group re-enters hospital through ER side door.
[03:15:00] === TIMESTAMP FLAGGED: SUSPICIOUS ACTIVITY ===
[03:15:00] License plate captured: NV-CHOW-88
[03:15:00] Vehicle: Silver Mercedes-Benz E-Class, 2023 model
[03:15:00] License plate trace: Registered to Leslie Chow
[03:15:00] Registration address: 1547 Industrial Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89101
[03:15:00] NOTE: Address corresponds to a WAREHOUSE in the industrial district
[03:15:00]
[03:15:00] FLAG{security_footage_mercedes_3_15_am}
[03:15:00]
[04:16:30] Three males (Wenneck, Price, Garner) return to Parking Lot B.
[04:17:00] Group enters a different vehicle (Black sedan, unknown plates).
[04:17:30] Black sedan exits Parking Lot B.
[04:18:00] Silver Mercedes remains in spot B-14.
[05:00:00] Morning shift security patrol - no issues noted.

=== END OF UNREDACTED BACKUP LOG ===
